incident_summary: Microbial contamination trend in Grade C corridor — 4 consecutive monthly EM samples above alert limit (14 to 19 CFU/m³, limit 91 CFU/m³). Batch D5509C manufactured during trend period.
root_cause_detail: HVAC return air filters not replaced on schedule for 4 months — PM delayed repeatedly due to spare parts supply issue. Recirculated air quality degraded progressively.
corrective_action: All HVAC return air filters replaced immediately. Enhanced sanitisation of Grade C corridor performed. Trend analysis reviewed by QA — no action limit breaches — batch acceptable.
preventive_action: Critical HVAC spare parts maintained in minimum stock level — reorder triggered at 3 units. PM for HVAC filters cannot be delayed beyond 7 days without QA Director approval.
effectiveness_check: Grade C EM within alert limits for 12 months. HVAC PM on-time compliance 100% for 12 months.
